name: Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd
summary: Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd. engages in the wedding business primarily in Japan. The company is involved in planning and management of overseas and domestic resort weddings; travel planning; celebrity and haute couture wedding; and event and decoration businesses. It also engages in the sale of products and services for honeymoon and anniversary travel; provides loan and financial cooperation for weddings; and designs, produces, sells, and rents bridal and formal wears. In addition, the company is involved in the operation of nursery, restaurants, and hotels, as well as provides consulting services. Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
